entry.note:
<L>4842<pc>1-0354<k1>aBIka<k2>aBI/ka<h>2 2. {#aBI/ka#}¦ (von {#aYc#} mit {#aBi#}; vgl. {#anUka, apAka, pratIka#}) <lex>n.</lex> {%das Zusammentreffen, Widerstand%}: {#prAva
manu\M dasya^ve kara\BIka^m#} . Davon loc. {#aBI/ke#} (mit Ausnahme von <ls>ṚV. 1,119,8.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">10,133,1.</ls> stets am Ende des <is>Pāda</is>) <ls>NAIGH. 2,17.</ls> <ls n="NAIGH.">3,29.</ls> <ls>NIR. 3,20.</ls> <div n="1"> 1) adv. <div n="2"> a) {%beim Zusammentreffen, gleichzeitig, rechtzeitig%}: {#ma\DyA yatkartva\maBa^vada\BIke\ kAma^M kfRvA
e pi	ari^ yuva	yAm#} <ls>ṚV. 10,61,6.</ls> {#saM yadviSo 'va^vftranta yu\DmA Adinnema^ indrayante a\BIke^#} <ls n="ṚV.">4,23,4.</ls> {#tA no\ yAma^nnuruzyatAma\BIke^#} <ls n="ṚV.">7,85,1.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">1,118,5.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">119,8.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">10,55,1.</ls> <div n="2">— b) {%im Augenblick, alsbald%}: {#sa\dyo dasyU
pra mf^Ra ku	syena\ pra sUra^Sca\kraM vf^hatAda\BIke^#} <ls>ṚV. 4,16,12.</ls> {#aha
nindro\ ada^hada\gniri^ndo puA dasyU^nma\DyaMdi^nAda\BIke^#} <ls n="ṚV. 4,">28,3.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">6,24,10.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">7,18,24.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">10,38,4.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 10,">133,1.</ls> <div n="1">— 2) praep. mit vorang. abl. <div n="2"> a) {%von — her, aus%}: {#A\sno vfka^sya\ varti^kAma\BIke^ (amumuktam)#} <ls>ṚV. 1,116,14.</ls> {#Suci\ reto\ nizi^kta\M dyOra\BIke^#} (wo {#dyOH#}, das auch <ls>VS. 33,11.</ls> steht, als abl. zu nehmen ist; richtig <ls>MAHĪDH.</ls> zu d. St.) <ls n="ṚV. 1,">71,8.</ls> <div n="2">— b) {%aus Anlass von, wegen%}: {#ma\haSci^dagna\ ena^so a\BIke^ UvAdde\vAnA^ ... [truncated]
